---
title: "Insights"
description: "NYC Yellow Taxi Tipping Behavior"
author: "Aaron Powell"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    code-tools: true
    df-print: kable
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(car)
library(broom)
library(here)

dir.create(here::here("taxi-tips-shiny/plots"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Source utility functions using project root 
source(here::here("code", "load_data.R"))
source(here::here("code", "validate_data.R"))
source(here::here("code", "clean_data.R"))
set.seed(6306)
```

```{r}
ds = sample_taxi_data(n=5000)
validate_sample(ds)
ds = clean_taxi_data(ds)
```

# Airport Analysis

```{r}
# Aggregate stats
library(knitr)
insight1 <- ds |>
  group_by(RatecodeID) |>
  summarise(n = n(),
            mean_tip = mean(tip_amount),
            median_tip = median(tip_amount),
            pct_zero_tip = mean(tip_amount == 0),
            .groups = "drop")

insight1 |> kable(caption = "Tipping by Ratecode (JFK vs Standard)")

# Visualization (excluding Unknown)
p1 = ds |>
  filter(RatecodeID != "Unknown") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = RatecodeID, y = tip_amount)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Tip Amount by RatecodeID (Airport vs Standard)",
       subtitle = "Higher tips on JFK trips") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18)
p1
```

# Temporal analysis

```{r}
insight2 <- ds |>
  group_by(rush_hour, overnight, pickup_dow) |>
  summarise(mean_tip = mean(tip_amount),
            n = n(),
            .groups = "drop")

insight2 |> kable()

# Day of week comparison
p2 = ds |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pickup_dow, y = tip_amount, fill = rush_hour)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(title = "Tip Amount by Day of Week",
       subtitle = "Rush-hour effect across days") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18)
p2

# Insight 2: Temporal Patterns – Rush Hour, Overnight, and Day of Week

# Aggregate mean tip by hour, day type, and rush/overnight 
temporal_summary <- ds |>
  mutate(
    day_type = if_else(pickup_dow %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday"), "Weekend", "Weekday"),
    time_period = case_when(
      overnight ~ "Overnight",
      rush_hour ~ "Rush Hour",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(pickup_hour, day_type, time_period) |>
  summarise(
    mean_tip = mean(tip_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_tip = median(tip_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se = sd(tip_amount, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),   # for error bands
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 1. Heatmap
p3 <- ggplot(temporal_summary, aes(x = pickup_hour, y = day_type, fill = mean_tip)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#f7fbff", mid = "#6baed6", high = "#08306b",
    midpoint = median(temporal_summary$mean_tip),
    name = "Mean Tip ($)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 23, by = 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Tip Amount by Hour",
    subtitle = "Rush-hour and overnight premiums",
    x = "Pickup Hour (0–23)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# 2. Line plot with confidence bands
p4 <- ggplot(temporal_summary, aes(x = pickup_hour, y = mean_tip, color = day_type, group = day_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_tip - 1.96 * se, ymax = mean_tip + 1.96 * se, fill = day_type),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Weekday" = "#1f77b4", "Weekend" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Weekday" = "#1f77b4", "Weekend" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 23, by = 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Tip Amount Over the Day",
    subtitle = "Weekday vs Weekend",
    x = "Pickup Hour",
    y = "Mean Tip Amount ($)",
    color = "Day Type",
    fill = "Day Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p3
p4

# Optional: Save high-res version for Shiny app or presentation
ggsave(here::here("taxi-tips-shiny/plots", "insight1_airport.png"), 
       plot = p1, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggsave(here::here("taxi-tips-shiny/plots", "insight2_temporal_patterns.png"), 
       plot = p4, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
